/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fsanitize=thread CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/Tests/Storage/test_multiset_storage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/Tests/Domain/test_order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/Tests/Engine/TestMatchingEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/Tests/Storage/test_binaryorderbook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/Tests/Engine/TestCoreEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/Tests/Concurrency/TestConcurrency.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/Tests/Concurrency/TestWorker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/Tests/Networking/TestProtocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/Tests/Networking/TestTcpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/Tests/TestEndToEnd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/Tests/Memory/TestOrderPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/Tests/Routing/TestOrderRouter.cpp.o -o run_tests  libtrading_lib_cov.a lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a lib/libgtest_main.a libimgui_lib.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework OpenGL lib/libgtest.a
